title: Collections fetched multiple times on page load
symptom: The collections Reunions, Courses, and Horses are being fetched twice during the page load process, leading to unnecessary data retrieval.
applies_when: Fetch automatic option is enabled in collection settings
Collections are used on the page
not_this_if: Collections are not used on the page
root_cause: When the 'fetch automatic' option is enabled in the collection settings, the collections are fetched automatically on every page load. This can lead to multiple fetches if workflows also trigger additional fetches for the same collections.
fix_steps: Go to the collection settings for Reunions, Courses, and Horses.
Ensure that the collections are fetched only through the designated workflows.
agent_instruction: Disable the 'fetch automatic' option in the collection settings to prevent double fetching.
